zh.lifeSummary: 當Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale於大約1035年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel32歲，母親Efa ferch Cynfyn18歲。他和Anne ferch Cadwgan至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale于大约1035年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel32岁，母亲Efa ferch Cynfyn18岁。他和Anne ferch Cadwgan至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewelyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

en.lifeSummary: When Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale was born about 1035, in Wales, his father, Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel, was 32 and his mother, Efa ferch Cynfyn, was 18. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Anne ferch Cadwgan. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale est né environ 1035, à Galles, son père, Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Efa ferch Cynfyn, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Anne ferch Cadwgan. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale um 1035 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel 32 und seine Mutter Efa ferch Cynfyn 18. Er hatte mit Anne ferch Cadwgan mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale è nato il circa 1035 nel Galles, il suo padre, Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Efa ferch Cynfyn, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Anne ferch Cadwgan. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yaleが約1035年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coelは32歳，母Efa ferch Cynfynは18歳であった。彼はAnne ferch Cadwganとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale(이)가 대략 1035년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Efa ferch Cynfyn(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Anne ferch Cadwgan(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale nasceu aproximadamente 1035, em Gales, seu pai, Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Efa ferch Cynfyn, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Anne ferch Cadwgan. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale родился около 1035 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Efa ferch Cynfyn, 18. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Anne ferch Cadwgan. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llywelyn Fychan ap Llywelyn Eurdorchog, Lord of Yale nació aproximadamente 1035, en Gales, su papá, Llewelyn Aurdorchog "Golden-Torqued" ap Coel, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Efa ferch Cynfyn, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Anne ferch Cadwgan. Murió en su pueblo.
